videos.title: What Game Design Gets Right About Attention (That Advertising Gets Wrong)
videos.description:
Want to get better at building big ideas? Check out Big Idea Bootcamp — a step-by-step course in strategic creative thinking: https://www.stuffaboutadvertising.com/big-idea-bootcamp

Game designers have spent decades figuring out how to make people voluntarily show up, stay engaged, and keep coming back. Advertisers are still trying to figure out how to stop people from hitting skip.
In this video I'm borrowing three concepts from game design — the magic circle, intrinsic vs. extrinsic motivatio
